popup.title: passwd-sso
popup.signIn: Sign in to passwd-sso to use the extension.
popup.unlockDescription: Enter your passphrase to unlock the vault.
popup.httpWarning: This page uses HTTP. Filling credentials on insecure pages is risky.

options.title: Settings
options.showBadgeCountHint: Display the number of matching credentials on the extension icon.
options.enableInlineSuggestionsHint: Display a dropdown with matching credentials when a login field is focused.
options.enableContextMenuHint: Show autofill options in the right-click context menu.
options.autoCopyTotp: Copy TOTP to clipboard after autofill
options.autoCopyTotpHint: After autofilling ID and password, copy the TOTP code to the clipboard. Useful when the site asks for TOTP on a separate page.
options.showSavePromptHint: Show a banner when a new login is detected.
options.showUpdatePromptHint: Show a banner when a password change is detected.
options.autoLockTenantNote: Tenant admin may override this setting.
options.clipboardClearHint: Automatically clear copied passwords from the clipboard.
options.vaultTimeoutLogoutHint: Logging out revokes the session and requires re-authentication.
options.shortcutsHint: Shortcuts are configured in the browser. Some shortcuts may be active even if shown as "Not set" here.

passkeySaveBanner.duplicateFound: A passkey for {rpName} is already saved.

commands.noMatch: No matching entry for this site

errors.noPassword: No password available for this entry.
errors.autoLockInvalid: Auto-lock minutes must be 0 or more
errors.noTotpConfigured: No TOTP configured for this entry
errors.invalidTotp: TOTP configuration is invalid for this entry
errors.networkError: Cannot connect to server. If using a self-signed certificate, open the server URL in a browser tab and accept the certificate first.
